content: I wasn't always the scary monster people say I am; once, I was just a lonely creature looking for a friend. Every night, I would watch the children playing from the dark forest, wishing someone would notice me. But when I tried to say hello, my big voice scared them away, and I felt even more alone. One night, a small child wandered near my home, and I wanted to keep them safe from the cold and dark. I gently wrapped my big, warm arms around them, hoping to give comfort, but they screamed and ran. I didn’t mean to frighten anyone; all I ever wanted was a friend to share the night with. Maybe one day, someone brave will see past my scary face and hear the kindness inside. Until then, I’ll keep watching and waiting, hoping for a friend who isn’t scared of me.
